name: Snapshot Off-Chain Governance Voting
description: Cast off-chain governance votes on Snapshot.org via EIP-712 signatures. Covers strategy verification, voting weight calculation at snapshot block, and proposal lifecycle awareness. The standard governance skill for any agent representing a DAO position.

steps.description: Query proposal { id, choices, snapshot, strategies, end } from the hub. Reject if end < now().
Resolve voting weight at the snapshot block using the proposal's strategies (erc20-balance-of, delegation, multichain, etc.). Reject if weight = 0.
POST { address, sig, data } to https://seq.snapshot.org/. Returns receipt with vote id.

rule.check: any vote where voter.toLowerCase() === agent.toLowerCase() && created > now - 7 days
rule.comment: Validator queries Snapshot Hub for the agent's recent votes and confirms at least one was cast in the last 7 days.
